title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Denjiro, Unknown person #3, Kaido, Kanjuro as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will take you to the secret entrance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We could get attacked at any moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAHAHA looks like you went through a lot!! but it will soon be over!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we were to fail, these PAST 20 YEARS would've been in vain!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like they are not expecting an enemy attack...

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Have they yet to receive KANJURO'S report?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we want to launch a surprise attack, it's now or never....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Kaido's mansion is at the very bottom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is a greater distance than we expected!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we are yet to be spotted, a counter attack would be best but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There were some shadows over there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But not to worry, they've fallen asleep now!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 30 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
